raw_response:
I agree with the assessment but would like to add another point for clarity. While mandibular molars (option B) indeed commonly cause infections spreading to the masticatory spaces via their root tips, tonsillar abscesses (option A), though not directly part of the masticatory system, can also lead to complications affecting adjacent soft tissue planes which might secondarily involve these spaces.
